## Privacy / network impact

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran `npm run smoke:history` if visual history changed
- [ ] I did not add telemetry
- [ ] I did not add analytics
- [ ] I did not add forced cloud dependency
- [ ] I did not add payment or license lock
- [ ] I did not hardcode private endpoints or keys
- [ ] I documented any new network behavior
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes
- [ ] I updated docs if user-facing behavior changed
